summary: IaC Management Tab testing complete. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working including 4 stat cards, environment selector, 4 collapsible sections (Terraform, Lambda, GitHub Actions, Deploy Commands), Record Deployment button, and Deployment History.
critical_code_review_comments: All IaC endpoints working correctly with proper response structures
GET /api/cve/iac/overview returns terraform, lambda, github_actions status, environments, deployment count
GET /api/cve/iac/terraform returns main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf content and environment configs
GET /api/cve/iac/lambda returns handler info, requirements, runtime (python3.12), handler_entry, timeout, memory_mb
GET /api/cve/iac/workflow returns GitHub Actions workflow content (build-lambda.yml)
POST /api/cve/iac/deployments creates deployment record with environment, component, status fields
GET /api/cve/iac/commands/{env} returns step-by-step deployment commands for dev/staging/prod
Frontend InfraTab component properly integrated with all endpoints
All data-testid attributes properly applied for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test deployments via POST /api/cve/iac/deployments during testing (4 via pytest + 1 via UI)
context_for_next_testing_agent: IaC Management Tab complete and tested. All backend APIs tested via pytest, frontend tested via Playwright. Infrastructure tab accessible at /cve-management with Infrastructure tab in navigation.

Backend_Endpoints.GET_overview: PASS - Returns terraform, lambda, github_actions status, environments, deployment count
Backend_Endpoints.GET_terraform: PASS - Returns main_tf, variables_tf, outputs_tf, environment configs with parsed tfvars
Backend_Endpoints.GET_lambda: PASS - Returns handler info, requirements, runtime (python3.12), memory_mb (256), timeout (60s)
Backend_Endpoints.POST_deployments: PASS - Creates deployment record with environment, component, version, status, deployed_by, notes
Backend_Endpoints.GET_commands_dev: PASS - Returns 6 deployment steps for dev environment
Backend_Endpoints.GET_commands_staging: PASS - Returns 6 deployment steps for staging environment
Backend_Endpoints.GET_commands_prod: PASS - Returns 6 deployment steps for prod environment
Backend_Endpoints.GET_commands_invalid: PASS - Returns 400 error for invalid environment

Frontend_Components.Infrastructure_tab_navigation: PASS - tab-infra data-testid, visible in CVE dashboard tabs
Frontend_Components.stat_terraform_card: PASS - Shows Configured status with green dot
Frontend_Components.stat_lambda_card: PASS - Shows Ready status with green dot
Frontend_Components.stat_github_actions_card: PASS - Shows Active status with green dot
Frontend_Components.environment_selector_DEV: PASS - env-dev data-testid, clickable, updates terraform configs
Frontend_Components.terraform_section: PASS - section-terraform data-testid, shows main.tf code and env variables
Frontend_Components.lambda_section: PASS - section-lambda data-testid, shows runtime, handler, memory, dependencies
Frontend_Components.workflow_section: PASS - section-workflow data-testid, shows build-lambda.yml content
Frontend_Components.deploy_commands_section: PASS - section-deploy-commands data-testid, shows 6 deployment steps
Frontend_Components.record_deployment_btn: PASS - record-deployment-btn data-testid, creates deployment entry
Frontend_Components.deployment_history_section: PASS - section-deploy-history data-testid, shows recorded deployments
